title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 633.155 - Admission for respite care for limited time only
text:
633.155.  Admission for respite care for limited time only. — 1.  The division may provide or obtain respite care for an intellectually disabled or developmentally disabled person for respite care of up to twenty-one days which may be extended up to an additional twenty-one days for good cause shown.  Any additional respite care beyond forty-two days within a one-year period shall be expressly approved by the director of the division.
  2.  Notwithstanding the provisions of section 633.120 and section 475.120, a regional center may admit an intellectually disabled or developmentally disabled person who has been declared legally incapacitated for respite care without a court order authorizing the guardian of such person to obtain such care of up to twenty-one days for good cause shown.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1724, A.L. 1983 S.B. 44 & 45, A.L. 1990 H.B. 1383, A.L. 2011 H.B. 555 merged with H.B. 648)
